ads.author: Ayden Henderson
ads.title: Off Road Challenge
ads.description: Off Road Challenge is a 1997 arcade and 1998 Nintendo 64 racing game by Midway, known for its arcade-style, multi-terrain off-road racing with customizable trucks, power-ups like nitro, and hidden vehicles. It's considered a spiritual successor to Ivan "Ironman" Stewart's Super Off Road, featuring modes like circuit racing where players earn cash to upgrade performance parts like suspension and tires, and multiplayer split-screen action. The game includes various obstacles like trains and UFOs, and tracks set in locations like the Mojave Desert and Las Vegas Dm me for more details

ads.author: Zachary Meny
ads.title: JUST ANNOUNCED! Transformers Pinball Machine + FREE SHIPPING!
ads.description: Transformers: More Than Meets The Eye pinball machine by Stern Pinball Pro Edition: $6,999 + FREE SHIPPING Premium Edition: $9,699 + FREE SHIPPING Limited Edition (LE) (only 750 units): $12,999 + FREE SHIPPING ORDER YOURS TODAY! Trades Accepted & We Can Ship To Anywhere In The USA Flip N Out Pinball flipnoutpinball.com greg@flipnoutpinball.com / 812.802.9588 ken@flipnoutpinball.com / 812.778.6083 zach@flipnoutpinball.com / 812.457.9711 The TRANSFORMERS franchise has captivated generations of people worldwide across toys, comics, television, film and merchandise. Now, fans can experience the legendary battle between Autobots and Decepticons like never before through immersive, action-packed pinball. TRANSFORMERS: More Than Meets the Eye by Stern Pinball is available now in Pro, Premium, and Limited Edition (LE) models. In Stern Pinball’s TRANSFORMERS: More Than Meets the Eye, players join Optimus Prime and the Autobots in their mission to stop Megatron and the Decepticons from stealing Earth’s energy, conquering Cybertron, and dominating the universe. TRANSFORMERS: More Than Meets the Eye pushes mechanical innovation to new heights with a fully animatronic Megatron robot toy with an articulated fusion cannon that rotates and fires pinballs back at players. Soundwave’s cassette deck locks pinballs before launching them into high-intensity action while a custom sculpted Optimus Prime robot bash toy stands ready for battle, adding depth and spectacle to this world under glass that’s ...MORE THAN MEETS THE EYE. Players will experience the ultimate battle between Autobots and Deceptions, and can store Energon Cubes to power up, team up with the Dinobots, collect Transformers Tech Spec cards, and prepare for a climactic battle against Megatron. Players embark on missions inspired by major story arcs from the original 1984 TRANSFORMERS animated television series, and the machine integrates authentic video clips and story-driven missions that bring the brand’s legacy to life. To celebrate the 40th anniversary of THE TRANSFORMERS: THE MOVIE, the game includes a special mode featuring the iconic song “The Touch” by Stan Bush, custom call-outs from legendary voice actors including Peter Cullen (Optimus Prime) and Frank Welker (Megatron and Soundwave), and original music from Knights of Unicron. Loaded with Stern Pinball’s cutting-edge technology, TRANSFORMERS: More Than Meets the Eye seamlessly blends physical and digital gameplay. Utilizing Stern’s award-winning Insider Connected platform, the machine introduces a brand-new Cyber Coin wallet system, where players can earn Cyber Coins to unlock exclusive challenge modes. The machine also features a special challenge mode, “Prime Training,” where Autobots guide players through the art of pinball mastery, and for the first time, includes a head-to-head experience that allows two players to compete simultaneously in real time. Limited to 750 games globally, the highly collectible Limited Edition model includes the updated Expression Lighting SystemTM and Speaker Expression Lighting System with TRANSFORMERS-themed game effects, a full-color mirrored backglass, full-color high-definition cabinet decals, exclusive custom pinball armor, a custom designer-autographed bottom arch, upgraded audio system, anti-reflection pinball playfield glass, shaker motor, a sequentially numbered plaque, a signed Certificate of Authenticity, and a digital Insider Connected LE owner’s badge on registration.

ads.author: Diana Mccullough Pryor
ads.title: New | Sharper Image 2-Player Laser Tag
ads.description: 2 PLAYER SET FOR BATTLES: The Sharper Image Electronic Tag two-person set includes everything you need for an exciting one-on-one battle! You can play indoors or outdoors to turn any setting into your arena! SOUND, LIGHT, AND EFFECTS: Each gun blaster sound and vest lights up, all make sound effects, and vibrates with various in-game actions. Feel like you’re in a real arcade arena with immersive sound and visual effects, and even try a game in dim light or at nighttime! It's the greatest holiday or Birthday gift for any child! VESTS FOR A FULL ARCADE EXPERIENCE: The Sharper Image laser tag set includes vests – just like at an arcade! The vests work as targets; dodging your enemy while firing aiming at your opponent’s vests. Vest lights, sounds, and vibration indicate successful hits! TRACKING POINTS FOR COMPETITIVE TEAM PLAYING: Each player starts with six lives; a successful shot depletes one life from a player’s vest, indicated by the triangle lights. A player is out after they’ve lost six lives. To win, eliminate your opponents! The blasters also track ammo; each has six rounds before requiring reloading. Simply pull back the slider on the guns to reload! YOU CAN BUY COMBINE SETS FOR MORE PLAYERS: Multiple sets are compatible with each other, so you can combine as many sets as you want to add as many players as you want! Turn your laser tag arena experience into a truly great battle!

ads.author: Clayton Burris
ads.title: Pinball Machine
ads.description: This machine has been in my wife's family since 1992 and it's a 1972. It's not currently working, hence the price. It should be a simple fix, due to the solid state electronics. All I have done is clean the glass after retrieving this from my wife's aunt's house since they were moving. From Pinside.com: Williams' single-player Spanish Eyes is notable for its polarizing, mosaic-style art package. It also features a pop bumper situated between the flippers and a center horseshoe lane; two design hallmarks of long-time Williams designer Norm Clark. The same characters and art style were employed for the art package of Williams’ single-player Granada, which was released the same year as Spanish Eyes but featured a completely different layout. The artwork is not from Christian Marche as is widely believed, but from John Craig instead. If you would like any additional pictures, please reach out. If the listing is up...it's still for sale. My wife would love for her father's machine to go to a loving collector and not a flipper. Willing to ship for the right price.

ads.title: The Cute Ants Bow
ads.description: The Cute Ants Bow That Can Be Used As A Lantern Swag, As A Topper, As Home Decor, On A Wreath, As A Mantle Bow, Ready2ship Here are some fun facts about ants: -An ant can lift 20 times its own body weight. If a second grader was as strong as an ant, she would be able to pick up a car! -Some queen ants can live for many years and have millions of babies! ...Ugh -Ants don’t have ears. Ants "hear" by feeling vibrations in the ground through their feet. -Queen ants have wings, which they shed when they start a new nest. -There are three kinds of ants in a colony: The queen, the female workers, and males. ...Well maybe not all are fun facts. This cute ant bow is made with 1 1/2 and 2 1/2 inch non-wired and wired edge ribbon. It has 19 loops and measures approximately 12 inches wide. There are 6 tails, the longest measuring approximately 17 inches. Total of Bow and tails is approximately 23 inches as shown on the lantern (not pulled tight) The Lantern in the pictures is 20” high and the wreath is 18 inches. The cost of this bow is $31. Note: If you would like this bow customized (smaller, larger), send me a message! We can also tailor bows to your specifications, such as ribbon variations (color, pattern, size, Etc...), model after another style, width, length, number of tails, etc. If you are interested, please send us an email with details and price range. Attaching Options: All of my bows are securely tied with florist wire and finished with a chenille stem and a round metal 1 inch ring for easy attachment. Additional quantities can be made to order. Purchase is for the bow only. Add an elegant look to a gift - Add to your mailbox - Attach to a wreath - Add to your yard - Add pizazz to lanterns (If you have 2 or 3 different sized lanterns, I can make a small, medium, and large bow to work for you.) - Add to your mantle - Use in weddings, etc. The bow will be shipped with tissue paper stuffed in the loops to help hold the shape during shipping. Just remove the paper and poof loops and it’s ready to go! We offer unique decor items, personalized silk flower arrangements, bows for weddings, home decor, lanterns, toppers, wreaths, etc. and hair accessories. UID 592

ads.author: John Phillips
ads.title: Vintage Arcade Machine – Working – Original 1980 Conversion Cabinet
ads.description: Up for sale is a vintage Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine in good working condition. This is an original early-80s unit, not a modern reproduction. This machine started life as a cabinet and was professionally converted to Ms. Pac-Man using a period-correct conversion kit (common practice in arcades at the time). The game runs on an original Pac-Man board with the Ms. Pac-Man daughterboard installed. Details: Fully playable Ms. Pac-Man Original CRT monitor (picture looks good for its age) Classic joystick + buttons Cabinet is solid with normal wear from age Side art present (shows some wear, see photos) Original wiring and internal components largely intact Includes original-style operator settings card inside Condition: Works and plays Some cosmetic wear consistent with age (scratches, fading, etc.) Not fully restored – great candidate for restoration or to enjoy as-is Notes for collectors: This is a Pac-Man to Ms. Pac-Man conversion, not a factory-dedicated Ms. Pac-Man cabinet. These were widely used in arcades in the early 1980s and are part of authentic arcade history. Pickup only – located in New Hope AL. Bring help, this is heavy. Message me with any questions or if you want additional photos or video of it running.

ads.description: This is the level 120 holy grail version of the card not the normal or regular holo. Fate Grand Order Arcade is a sister game to the gatcha Fate Grand Order. It was recently discontinued. In it you can summon certain characters or servants and level them up. Once you do so you can print them out and use them in game. This card in particular is the level 120 holy grail variant of the limited release Rider Artoria Alter. You can find the normal and holo variants of the card online. Although since the game is discontinued I’m not sure how many level 120 variants are left (you can denote the difference by seeing the holy grail beneath the five stars at the top of the card along with more designs surrounding the rider symbol at the bottom of the card). Honestly I’ve never seen another one of these cards online so that makes selling this tricky. I’m also open to trade for one piece. Feel free to ask questions.

ads.description: **Classic Sit-down Cocktail Arcade Machine** 2 Player (back and forth play) Over 300 Games Glass is tempered for safety The Classic Cocktail is a favorite for people going after the nostalgic arcade look; this is the type of machine that used to be in a lot of restaurants like Pizza Hut in the 80s. It has classic games and look, but the added modernization of multiple games and volume control. You can't find machines like this anywhere else. The High Score arcade machines stand out because they are 100% custom-designed and built by a team in Tennessee with years of experience. No prebuilt templates or kits, no stock artwork. The High Score understands that making a machine as easy to operate as possible is essential for rental properties, game rooms, break rooms, and businesses. That's why all High Score machines are all plug-and-play (no complicated start up or shut down) and include easy-access volume control.

ads.title: Sega 007 GOLDENEYE pinball machine James Bond
ads.description: James Bond 007 Goldeneye pinball. Produced by Sega in 1996. It is It is in great condition. Fully shopped / refurbished and upgraded with a full LED lit playfield. Everything is calibrated and works properly as it should (Magnets, satellite, etc) Very nice player's condition SEGA 007 Goldeneye! The game has been gone through and shopped out with rubbers, rebuilt flippers and LEDs. The driver board has been rebuilt, the sound board has been recapped, the CPU is a brand new replacement, all mechanisms have been taken apart and cleaned, with parts changed as needed. The multi-ball reel lock has a brand new belt on it. The playfield is in fantastic shape for this title. The game plays great! It has a custom made, extra thick, anti-reflective glass i got specially cut that will support the weight of my cats that jump on it (I had it made for this purpose) - the gun trigger and many of the unique parts like the satellite were replaced with new-old stock from Sega- all official Sega stock. There are just a handful of these left in the United States with most in the hands of private collectors. I have the key for the coin slot, key for the head board, original manual & it is updated to the most current rom. $3800 price is firm - Serious inquiry only. Will accept cash or Zelle only. You would need to come pick it up. I live in Haines City, Florida just outside of Orlando.

ads.author: Furniture Closeouts
ads.title: **Upright Arcade Machine**
ads.description: **Upright Arcade Machine** 2 Player (with lots of simultaneous gameplay) Over 1000 games The Upright Arcade Machine has been a favorite for younger clients or families because two players can play at the same time against each other on multiple games (while the Whiskey Barrel and Cocktail machines have games that go back and forth between player one and two for their turns). A lot of kids aren't used to having to wait their turn to play against someone in video games and this is a great addition to any game room. You can't find machines like this anywhere else. The High Score arcade machines stand out because they are 100% custom-designed and built by a team in Tennessee with years of experience. No prebuilt templates or kits, no stock artwork. The High Score understands that making a machine as easy to operate as possible is essential for rental properties, game rooms, break rooms, and businesses. That's why all High Score machines are all plug-and-play (no complicated start up or shut down) and include easy-access volume control.

The Complete Set Includes: Authentic TMNT II The Arcade Game Cartridge Original Retail Cardboard Box Original Instruction Manual Official Black Nintendo NES Dust Sleeve Condition (Please Read): The game has been fully tested and plays perfectly with no graphical issues. ads.description: Join us this weekend for a SNEAK PREVIEW of the newest pop-up toy museum coming to Vero Beach! The Totally 80’s Toy Museum is popping up later this summer but you can get a SNEAK PREVIEW this weekend for just $10! Get discounted, early admission to the museum plus FREE PLAY on Classic arcade games and video games! It’s fun for the whole family and the perfect gift for Dad this Father’s Day! Plus enjoy UNLIMITED FREE PLAY on classic video console and arcade games like: Galaga Ms Pac-Man Street Fighter II Cruisn’ Super Mario Bros from the NES Castlevania Zelda Mike Tyson’s Punch-Out and many more!

ads.author: Jokton Strealy
ads.title: Tri Zone Pinball by Williams
ads.description: This Tri Zone pinball machine has been completely refurbished and is ready to play in your gameroom or business. This game is known as a Williams Solid State, a category of pinball that is highly sought after for its great sound and snappy mechanicals. The pop bumpers, drop targets, flippers and other solenoids have been rebuilt for a long life. The lighting has been upgraded to modern LED bulbs, and all of the displays are crisp and bright. The electronics have been replaced with a modern CPU and Driver board combo that is much more robust and reliable than the original’s. It also has an integrated non-volatile memory, so that battery backup is not required. Delivery is available for a fee.

This is an original Playfield that Chris Clear-Coated Everything has been rebuilt/rewired & bulletproofed Full LED kit with GI OCD Board Pinshakers Shaker Kit - This thing SHAKES Color DMD Brass Lockdown Bar Brass Side Rails Gold Plated Legs (some patina on the legs - if you're a perfectionist, you might want to refinish them) Chromed Lock Down Bar Receiver Includes DMD Jackpot Board Gold Captive Ball LIOR Art of Pinball COMPLETE kit - Includes the temple, Path of Adventure, all of the lower pieces, the Gold Idol and the Full Apron Cover Gun Handle has been Powdercoated and Repainted Flipper Buttons, Start Button and Buy-In Button all have mylar protection around them There is one mark on the left side of the body - will edit photos to show it. I can help prep for pickup by CRST/Beltman or I can prep for freight shipping to your home, work, or a dock pickup. This is a widebody pin - and it's heavy. Shipping wont be cheap, but it will be packed right, safely and fully insured.

ads.author: David Collins
ads.title: Full-size electronic Pinball with force feedback.
ads.description: This is not a cheap big-box-store virtual pinball machine. This is a custom-built, full-size virtual pinball cabinet designed to deliver a true arcade experience. Featuring realistic force feedback, the cabinet uses real solenoids, contactors, and flashing LEDs to recreate the feel and excitement of a real pinball machine. You’ll feel the flippers fire, bumpers activate, and even the ball rolling across the playfield, creating an incredibly immersive experience. The machine includes a large high-definition playfield display, a dedicated backglass monitor, and a traditional spring-loaded plunger for authentic gameplay. Built with a sturdy cabinet, integrated speakers, cooling fans, and a heavy-duty four-leg metal base, this machine is designed for both performance and durability. With hundreds of pinball tables preloaded and the ability to add thousands more from online sources, you’ll never run out of games to play. Whether you’re a casual player or a serious pinball enthusiast, this custom virtual pinball machine delivers the sights, sounds, and feel of a real pinball arcade right in your home. Willing to trade for a boat! Located in Riverview in shadow run.

ads.author: Zach Stevens
ads.title: Arcade Fire 10/4/2007
ads.description: Title: RARE Arcade Fire 2007 USA Tour Shadowbox Poster | Burlesque Design | 569/630 Description: Up for sale is a highly collectible and rare Arcade Fire poster from their 2007 USA Tour. Designed by Wes Winship (Burlesque of North America) and Adam R. Garcia (The Pressure), this isn't just a standard print—it's designed to be cut and folded into a 3D shadowbox. Item Details Band: Arcade Fire Tour: 2007 USA Tour (Featuring dates for Waterfall Amphitheater, Starlight Theatre, Roy Wilkins Auditorium, Waterfront Park, and LC Pavilion) Artists: Wes Winship (Burlesque of North America) & Adam R. Garcia (The Pressure) Edition: Limited run, hand-numbered 569/630 Special Features: The reverse side is fully printed with red-ink instructions and cut-lines outlining how to assemble the poster into a working shadowbox with an oculus and interchangeable backdrops. Condition Overall great condition for its age, remaining completely uncut and unfolded. Shows minor edge wear, slight corner dings, and some faint handling smudges on the white borders (please closely review all detail photos, specifically 15026.jpg and 15029.jpg). A fantastic, interactive piece of tour merchandise for any serious music collector. Ships carefully rolled in a sturdy poster tube.

ads.author: Tom Yario
ads.title: Track and Field Arcade Game
ads.description: Original 1983 with refurbished new board! Relive the golden age of arcades with the legendary Track & Field by Konami—one of the most iconic competitive arcade games ever made! This is the game that started countless rivalries and drew crowds around the machine as players battled for world-record scores. Featuring exciting Olympic-style events including the 100 Meter Dash, Long Jump, Javelin Throw, High Jump, Hammer Throw, and more, Track & Field delivers fast-paced action that remains just as addictive today as it was in the 1980s. Whether you're a serious collector, arcade operator, sports bar owner, game room enthusiast, or looking for a centerpiece attraction, this machine is guaranteed to grab attention and keep players coming back for "just one more try." Features: Original Konami arcade classic One of the most recognizable arcade titles ever produced Competitive multiplayer gameplay Perfect for arcades, game rooms, bars, and collectors Timeless gameplay that appeals to all ages High replay value and strong nostalgia factor Why Buy This Machine? Track & Field is not just an arcade game—it's a piece of arcade history. Few games create the excitement, competition, and crowd participation that this classic delivers. Players instantly recognize it, and first-time players quickly become hooked trying to beat their personal bests. Own one of the greatest sports arcade games ever made and bring home a true arcade legend!

ads.author: Jason Hudgins
ads.title: Atari Vindicators Arcade Game 2 Player Tank
ads.description: Up for sale is a beautiful, highly restored Atari Vindicators dedicated arcade cabinet. 2-player tactical tank shooter is famous for its unique dual-joystick "tank controls" and intense cooperative gameplay. Monitor Chassis Rebuilt: The original CRT monitor chassis has been fully pulled, cleaned, and rebuilt with a premium cap kit and new critical components. The picture is crisp, colors are vibrant, and the geometry is excellent—no convergence issues. Audio Electronics: Rebuilt sound PCB. The iconic Atari sound effects and synth soundtrack are crystal clear with zero hum or static. New Power Supply: Mint condition, rock-solid power supply installed. Cabinet Cosmetics: Brand new original-style coin door installed. All external metal trim, brackets and panels have been stripped and professionally powder coated for a bulletproof, better-than-factory finish. Controls: Both sets of dual-joysticks have been cleaned, serviced, and register perfectly. Thumb buttons and triggers are snappy and responsive.

ads.author: David Fuss
ads.title: Pinball machine Rush limited edition
ads.description: For sale, this RUSH LE pinball machine is not to be missed. In addition to the premium features, this limited edition version includes a large number of extras; Limited to 1,000 LE machines globally, the highly collectible LE version includes the Expression Lighting System. With 96 intelligent RGB LEDs, the Expression Lighting System enables full color spectrum control. Positioned in pockets cut into the cabinet sides to provide color themed full playfield illumination, this integrated playfield lighting system is synchronized to custom light shows specifically designed for every song and dynamically responsive to game events. The LE version also includes an exclusive full color mirrored backglass inspired by Clockwork Angels, iconic custom cabinet artwork, custom high gloss and powder-coated guitar-shaped pinball armor, a custom designer-autographed bottom arch, exclusive inside art blades, upgraded audio system, anti-reflection pinball playfield glass, shaker motor, a sequentially numbered plaque. Topper included!

There are some wear spots around the light areas. To my knowledge, all the lights are working but it is possible that a couple might have been missed (this game has lots of lights). Backglass is in usable condition but would be a candidate to be replaced (see pictures). New LED displays. The only issue with the game itself is that after about 2-3 hours, the game restarts and turning it off and on gets it working again. If I get time, I will look at it. I am guessing a connectior issue. Would consider trades on dmd and newer machines.

ads.author: Glenda Singletary
ads.title: (PENDING) Arcade
ads.description: Arcade Cabinet – Mortal Kombat / Golden Tee Conversion with 96-in-1 MAME Board Selling an arcade cabinet project. This cabinet originally appears to have been a Mortal Kombat I cabinet that was later converted by a coin-op operator into a Golden Tee machine, likely around 2000/2001. The Golden Tee board has since been removed and replaced with a 96-in-1 MAME-style arcade board. The Golden Tee control panel was removed and replaced with an original Mortal Kombat-style control panel, making it a great candidate for someone who wants a classic fighting-game layout. The current board includes a large selection of well-known arcade titles, including: Pac-Man, Dig Dug, Metal Slug, Street Fighter, and many others. No key for coin slot. The cabinet powers on and has the multi-game board installed, but the control panel needs to be wired back in. Some of the wiring came loose during transport, so this is being sold as a project or fixer-upper for someone comfortable with arcade wiring. Great cabinet for a collector, arcade hobbyist, arcade, game room, or someone wanting to restore/customize a classic cabinet. Condition: Project cabinet / needs control panel wiring / no key. Includes: Cabinet, monitor, 96-in-1 arcade board, Mortal Kombat-style control panel Sold as-is. Buyer responsible for pickup/loading.

ads.author: Russell Allen Myers
ads.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula Pinball Machine For Sale
ads.description: Bram Stoker’s Dracula Pinball Machine For Sale Location: Linwood NJ I accept cash only $4300 Cash Only In-Person Sale Only I will not ship No PayPal, No Venmo, No personal checks, No Money Orders The Details: All backbox boards original and unhacked in good shape, EXCEPT: Rottendog MPU board with NVRAM upgrade – no batteries needed Retrorefurbs BSD Alt Translite (original included with game if you want it) Brand New Full BSD Plastics Set by Bryan Kelly installed Modfather - Custom Painted Village, Graveyard, and Castle sculpts New lockdown bar Cliffy Protector Set Titan Competition Rings throughout Brand new playfield glass New nylon nail feet on back rails Custom apron cards C2 capacitor added on Fliptronics 2 board - 100μF/100V Comet LEDs throughout New blue start button New Leg bolt plates Black leg bolts Cab protectors Full flipper rebuilds + bushings x2 + bats New Flipper coils FL-15411 x2 Pop Bumper tune ups and new Pop spoons x3 Lit red flipper buttons + 555 bulb holders New coin door lock and backbox lock assy New Rollover black drop target + target spring New AC Line cord cover #01-10714 and new line cord All New star posts and plastic posts replaced - red Hex spacers for BSD Proto sling plastics New Anarchy Fliptronics 2 flipper button opto assemblies x2 New Dumbass 24-Opto Board included (but not installed) New GLM 10-opto board installed New artblades Tilt Graphics – MUST USE BLADE PROTECTORS; NOT KIDDING – very very tight fit of the playfield to cabinet, common to every BSD I’ve ever worked on Ramps all in good shape DMD in good shape, no outgassing Target decals New woofer and tweeter speakers This game is definitely a re-import, probably from the UK Cabinet condition: Good overall, no water or moisture damage, no mold. No big hits or dings. Rear bottom cabinet edge had drag damage, repaired with JBWeld 2-party wood epoxy putty and painted Cabinet has third leg bolt hole at all 4 corners. I have seen this before from re-imports maybe 3 or 4 times. Covered by the legs, does not affect cabinet integrity. No idea why they did this. Cabinet reds had typical fade; all reds touched-up by hand; easily removable if this bothers you Playfield: Lenc Smith There is some light planking visible here and there; not bad at all The inserts are all dead flat, no insert wear at the lightning bolts or cross, which is common on BSD NOTE: Just above the Shoot Again triangular insert, there is a small crack in the top layer of the playfield due to some dim-bulb using a slightly too-long screw to re-mount the flipper plate from below. It’s glued down and there is a small mylar square over it. Playfield freshly cleaned and waxed Everything works 100% on this BSD. Plays fast and mean. I would call it a good condition players game, not a high-end resto. Presents well, plays very well Fully shopped out by me

ads.author: Dan Furlong
ads.title: Original Donkey Kong TKG3 Arcade Machine
ads.description: Price: $3000 OBO ________________________________________ Rare Red Donkey Kong (TKG3) Arcade – Original Nintendo Cabinet This is one of the hardest-to-find variations of Donkey Kong — the TKG3 red cabinet model. Out of roughly 80,000–100,000 Donkey Kong machines produced, only an estimated 1,500–2,500 were originally manufactured in red (about 2–3%). These were among the earliest production units, making them highly sought after by collectors today. This machine is an authentic, original Nintendo cabinet from the early 1980s — not a reproduction — and is serial number 2344, which highlights just how early this unit is. Read more about the history of the DK TKG3 machines with red cabinets here: https://www.vintagearcadegal.com/post/a-definitive-guide-to-donkey-kong-red-cabinets-and-other-variations ________________________________________ Condition & Hardware • Original 4-board set included (working, but occasionally temperamental) • Original power supply – still works, but installed new, version that is considered more stable • Original Sanyo CRT monitor – bright, clear, and authentic • Cabinet retains original components and structure • Has original name plate on the back To ensure reliable gameplay, I installed: • A modern 50-game board • A new power supply • A new video/audio board (improves sound clarity) The best part: All upgrades are completely reversible. No wires were cut — everything is plug-and-play. You can easily return the machine to its original configuration. Or, you can upgrade to a new LCD flat screen that is supported by the new video board, but I prefer to keep the original monitor as do most collectors. Note: The original boards likely just need cleaning/service (~$150) to improve consistency. ________________________________________ Cabinet Details • Original bezel, marquee, and control panel in great condition • 7-slot speaker grille (correct for this production period) • Accepts coins or free play • Includes all original keys As an early-production unit, this machine: • Does NOT include trademark symbols on the bezel/side art • Reflects authentic early manufacturing details collectors value ________________________________________ Cosmetic Notes • Side laminate and trim show wear • I intentionally left these original for authenticity If desired, I can replace the laminate and trim for $1,500, but many collectors prefer preserving originality. ________________________________________ Why This Machine Stands Out • Extremely rare TKG3 red cabinet • Early serial number (#2344) • Original hardware included + modern reliability upgrades • Fully reversible modifications • True collector’s piece with historical significance ________________________________________ Additional Info I’m happy to provide interior photos and answer any questions. This is a functional piece of arcade history — whether you’re a serious collector or just want an incredible centerpiece, this machine delivers both authenticity and playability. ________________________________________ Message me for details, pricing, or to see it in person.

ads.author: Tanner Walters
ads.title: Fireball! Classic (Bally, 1985) Pinball Machine
ads.description: Fireball! Classic (Bally, 1985) Pinball Machine This is a very nice example of this machine. It’s in great shape! If you’ve been holding out on a nice, classic Bally game, consider this one. Its unique gameplay would fit well in any pinball lineup. Gameplay Features: Exciting 3-Ball Multiball, Outlane Kicker to hit the ball back into play, Central Spinning Disk to keep you on your toes, Ramp, 2 Skill Shots, 3 Pop Bumpers, 2 Saucers, a Captive Ball. It’s been gone through and made sure it’s working 100%. For a full list of what has been done, see below: -New LED Score Displays Installed -New LEDs Installed throughout the Machine -New Capacitors Install on the Solenoid Driver Board -New Capacitors Install on the Sound Board -Remote Battery Installed to Protect the MPU -New Leg Levelers Installed -Playfield cleaned and polished -Playfield Plastics we’re cleaned and polished -Red LEDs added to the Backglass Fireball Images to Enhance the Art -All Fuses Checked for Correct Amperage -Playfield Glass and Backglass Cleaned -New Plunger Barrel Spring Installed The Backglass is in perfect condition. Not one scratch or flaking paint. Perfect and original. Also comes with original manuals. I’m happy to work with the buyer to ship the pin, or I can deliver it directly to you for an added fee. Trades for working or non-working machines are also acceptable. I’m open to all trade offers, but I’m particularly interested in trading for: - ~1960s Ball Bowler (no shuffle bowlers) - Flight Simulator or Flight Arcade Games Have an old pin you don’t want? We buy pins as well! You can check out my Website or Instagram to see my other work and restorations: ThePinballScientist.com or @ThePinballScientist **FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS** Q: Can it be taken a part so I can fit it in my car? A: Yes, the backbox can be removed with 4 bolts and it lifts off the cabinet. The legs can be removed with 2 bolts on each leg. Once it is disassembled, the pinball machine can easily be carried or moved with a dolly. Q: If something does need replacement, are parts available to be bought? A: Yes! There are multiple sites that sell parts for nearly any pinball machine at reasonable prices and fast shipping. You can also contact me if you’d like parts. I’m happy to help. Located in Lakeville, MN. Keywords: game room gameroom arcade mancave fun collectible antique college dorm room frat fraternity house entertainment gift man cave present decoration pin bar barcade fire firefighter mythical fictional fire god

ads.title: Jersey Jack Elton John Platinum Edition (PE) – HUO – 421 Plays
ads.description: Jersey Jack Elton John Platinum Edition (PE) – HUO – 421 Plays For sale is my Jersey Jack Elton John Platinum Edition pinball machine. Home Use Only and collector-owned. Currently showing just 421 lifetime plays. I loved the game so much I ended up buying a CE. Manufactured March 2024. This game includes the factory topper and factory shaker motor and is in excellent condition throughout. The cabinet, playfield, display, and powder-coated armor all present beautifully. The game is fully functional with no known issues and has lived in a climate-controlled, smoke-free home. Elton John PE is one of Jersey Jack’s most impressive releases, featuring stunning artwork, incredible light shows, exceptional sound quality, and a deep, rewarding ruleset built around one of the greatest music catalogs ever featured in pinball. Features: • Platinum Edition • Manufactured March 2024 • Home Use Only (HUO) • 421 lifetime plays • Factory topper included • Factory shaker motor installed • Excellent cosmetic condition • Fully working with no known issues • Adult-owned • Climate-controlled, smoke-free environment • Includes original documentation and accessories The machine can be seen and played prior to purchase. Less than 1 hour run time on the monitor. Monitor has a beautiful picture. The control panels are mint and original. Also I have installed 2 brand new old stock Williams cocktail complete joysticks with brand new leaf switches. Also a total of 12 brand new lucent original Williams buttons and brand new leaf switches. And brand new leaf switches for player 1 and player 2 start buttons. The boardsethave been updated from 4116 ram which runs hot to 4164 ram that runs cool. This machine is also running the linear power supply. All wiring is intact, no wiring has been spliced together. Game can be set on freeplay or coin operated. Game boards are running at 100 % You will not find another one in this shape. Price is $ 2,800.00 CASH FIRM. If interested message me here.

ads.author: Brad Nordling
ads.title: Bally Party Animal Pinball Machine
ads.description: Bally Party Animal pinball machine. This game plays great, it's not in perfect condition but it's not bad by any means. Has a few small issues, there's a few lights out and the 3rd and 4th player displays have a segment that's not working. A couple of the plastics are broken, one is missing, it may be in the game but it will need to be replaced more then likely. The game is priced accordingly to the condition. Let me know if you need more pictures or if you want to stop by and play it. It's a fun game for the price and as we all know, it's hard to find any pinball machines that are less then 2K these days. Update to post: I have half of the plastic piece that goes by the frog, the other half is gone. The plastic over the left slingshot has a corner broken off. The lights for party animal in the middle of the playfield are not working. Could be a simple fix, could be a bad transistor on the board. I haven't looked into it, I don't know for sure what the problem is. There's 2 displays in the game. 1 for player 1 and 2 and 1 for player 3 and 4. Player 3 and 4 display needs to be repaired. I swapped the displays, so I know it's the not the main board that is the problem, it is for sure a problem with the display. There are a few small issues with the game, so if you are not comfortable with fixing things this may not be the machine for you. If it doesn't sell the way it is, I will take the time to fix the problems and relist the game at a higher price.

The cabinet is also decent but has some wear by the flipper buttons and coin door. I liked the patina look so I didn’t touch it up, but I’m sure it would come out looking great with some elbow grease. The only issue I’ve had with it, is that a small section of GI lamps in the top right of the playfield like to go out because the pin on that connector is flaky. I meant to repin it but never got around to it. MPU and Aux board were professionally serviced a year ago. Pickup near the Arden/Arcade area of Sacramento. Let me know if you have any questions! ads.author: Jason Webb
ads.title: Alice Cooper's Nightmare Castle Pinball Machine
ads.description: This is your chance to own a piece of pinball history — and a piece of Arizona history. Only 500 were ever made. Spooky Pinball produced an extremely limited run of Alice Cooper's Nightmare Castle, making it one of the rarest machines you'll ever find. These rarely come up for sale, and when they do, they don't last long. And here's what makes this even more special — we're in Arizona, the home of Alice Cooper himself. You can't get more authentic than owning this machine in the Godfather of Shock Rock's own backyard. What you're getting: • A rare, limited-production Spooky Pinball machine (1 of only 500) • Alice Cooper music, voice callouts, and stunning horror-themed artwork • Immersive multiball madness and nightmare-fueled gameplay • Boutique build quality from one of pinball's most passionate manufacturers Asking: $6,300 — local pickup in Glendale AZ Whether you're a die-hard Alice Cooper fan, a serious pinball collector, or both — this machine belongs in your game room. Don't miss it. Serious inquiries only. Come play it before you buy.

ads.author: John Eric Booth
ads.title: Fully Restored - Operation Thunderbolt Arcade Shooter Game
ads.description: Hey John here from Gameroom Medic! Here is an incredible, fully restored Taito "Operation Thunderbolt" 2-player arcade game from my own collection. It's amazing! This will make someone an outstanding addition to their home arcade and take advantage of a great opportunity! This game is awesome! Last year I performed an intensive, full restoration on this machine... ya gotta see it in person to fully appreciate. This one's from 1989 and let me tell ya, you'd think it's brand new. The coin door was completely disassembled and repainted as well as all coin mechanism parts working perfectly, along with sparkling new vinyl cabinet artwork throughout. Several improvements were made as well including new upper speakers and the addition of a mid-bass speaker and amplifier for added impact! An aluminum footrest (one of my signature mods) replaced the plastic version. New dolly-style casters have been installed. A 25" minty fresh Wells Gardner K7000 monitor provides a stunning picture. The color is vibrant and screen is crystal clear... no burn in! The Uzi machine guns have both been completely disassembled and cleaned. New potentiometers were installed as well. The recoil feature is super fun and works beautifully! Inside the unit is equally impressive. Completely cleaned and painted along with cleaned wiring harnesses. A new power supply has been installed and main PC board fully recapped. This is without a doubt an archive quality machine, completely solid and ready for great game play. I challenge you to find this game in equal condition anywhere! No trades. Cash only. I hate to see this one go but I just don't have room for it. It's big! And heavy! Delivery can be provided but rental of a full liftgate box truck will be necessary. I will not respond to auto-generated messages such as "is this available?" Serious inquiries only please. I welcome your questions, and any respectable offers.

ads.description: Designed for four players The playfield simulates fire effects. The player must quickly put out fires when they appear in various places on the playfield by either completing a A. Bank of targets or making a lit shot includes instruction manual. The machine is themed around firefighting, with a unique playfield design that simulates extinguishing fires Repair The Williams Fire! pinball machine, released in 1987, is a firefighting themed game that challenges players to extinguish fires as they randomly break out across the playfield. This machine, designed by pinball legend Barry Oursler, distinguishes itself through a symmetrical playfield layout that intentionally omits traditional pop bumpers. How does the Williams Fire rescue siren effect work during multiball? Feature Description Highlight Mechanical Bell A real brass bell located at the top of the backbox rings during play to enhance the sound . SO SO MUCH FUN TO PLAY IN EXCELLENT WORKING SHAPE, $1500 spent on recent interior restoration. Msg now for more detail details

ads.author: Galvin Morgan
ads.title: Whirlwind Pinball Machine
ads.description: $4,300 OBO, open to trades. For your consideration is this overall nice copy of Whirlwind. Playfield is, honestly, the nicest original playfield on a system 11 that I have seen - it’s in *great* shape. Very little wear on the back saucer, both front scoops have cliffys, and the decals on the spinning disks are new. Translite is nice, as expected. The cabinet has definitely seen better days, but the art is still clearly visible. Little bit of peeling and scarring, the worst of which is pictured. In the backbox, it has an all new (Rottendog) power driver. The MPU has seen some battery damage, but still operates fine (and now has the batteries mounted in a separate pack) - it may be worth cleaning up if you’re into that. Now, let me tell you. This is probably the best playing copy of Whirlwind I have seen... ever? Certainly in a while. The upper flipper is incredibly strong and has no issue with the jackpot shot. All of the mechs are strong and snappy (pops, slings, upkickers). Inserts have been converted to LED. If you’d like to LED out the GI, I can probably toss in some bulbs. Thanks for considering! Please reach out with questions or offers.

ads.title: Upright GameMaster 2 Player Arcade Machine
ads.description: New Console - Never Used - Originally Paid $3,100 in April 2025 - Still On Original Shipping Pallet Disclosure - the button all the way to the left has an LED that is out. Play Thousands of Games – Packed with 7,000+ classic and modern arcade titles, giving you endless hours of entertainment. Authentic Arcade Feel – Experience real arcade controls with two-player joysticks, 6 Action plus coin/start LED buttons per player, and a color-changing 3-inch trackball. Massive 32” HD Display – Crystal-clear gameplay that makes every pixel pop. No Coin Required! – No need to fish for quarters—this version is all about pure, unlimited play! GRS Linux Build – Arrives fully built and ready to go—just unbox, plug in, and start gaming. ArcadePro Mobility+ Package (Included!) Dynamic LED Lighting – Vibrant, customizable glow beneath the arcade for the ultimate ambiance. Slimline Design – Space-saving yet full-sized, fits seamlessly into any room. DynamicLock Casters – Easy to move, then lock in place for intense gaming sessions. UltraReinforce Kit – Built tough with extra bracketing for unmatched durability. Removable Plex – Keep your screen pristine with easy-to-clean removable plexiglass. Plug & Play Convenience – Arrives fully built and ready to go—just unbox, plug in, and start gaming. Guitar Hero Accessories Included PC Upgrade For the ultimate arcade experience, upgraded to Windows 11 PC. Featuring an Intel i5 processor, 16GB of RAM, and a dedicated Nvidia 1030 GPU, this option provides top-tier performance. The Windows 11 PC supports multiple HDMI outputs, making it ideal for digital marquees and multi-monitor setups. It also includes a 1TB SSD for ample storage. This setup is perfect for playing more demanding games, including high-demand MAME games, pinball, guns, and a curated selection of PC games such as Clone Hero, Contra Operation Galaga, Ghosts n Goblins Resurrection, Mortal Kombat Komplete, and more. This upgrade has been added for the best performance and gaming experience. Whether you’re reliving the golden age of gaming or creating new memories, this arcade brings the fun, no quarters needed! Dimensions: 31.5′′ W x 69′′ H x 26.25′′ D | Weight: ~180 lbs Local Pick Up Preferred Otherwise Buyer Responsible for Shipping

So, the game still has the damage. They were supposed to make 10 of these engraved editions but I think they only made 1 or 2. It might be one of the rarest games on pinside. If you look at the engraved edition you will see only 1 person has this game in their collection. I don't think there's another pinball game on pinside that has only 1 owner. ads.author: Tom Grizzard
ads.title: 1992 Konami X-Men video arcade (PLEASE READ COMMENTS)
ads.description: 1992 Konami X-Men video arcade game is a retro collectible arcade gaming machine that allows players to experience the popular X-Men franchise through interactive gameplay. With Konami's reputation for quality and innovation, this arcade game offers a nostalgic gaming experience for fans of the series and collectors of vintage arcade machines. Featuring the iconic X-Men characters and storyline, this video arcade game is a must-have for any gaming enthusiast looking to add a piece of arcade history to their collection. THE GOOD: Cabinet is in great overall condition. Monitor has no issues. Joysticks work fine, might be loose for some likeness/favor but nothing a new centering grommet would not solve... and not seized for removal as I did remove to clean and made adjustments, and shafts were cleaned well so wouldn't seize in near future (for easy removal). THE BAD: Original gameboard took a dump on me, and cost to replace is hovering around $1000.00... so, I installed a Pandora's DX box (turning off all games except X-men, so boots directly into game) and wiring the player 3 and player 4 control in via two "USB Joystick" pcb wiring adapters. The Pandora DX does support 4 players in Konomi X-Men with only one quirk that is not an issue... when you start either player three or player four you get player three, followed by player four... no big deal at all... besides that one super minor quirk everything works as it should. To be clear, you can play a three player or a four player game no problem, and you can pick who is each... you just get player 3 controls first regardless if you hit player 3 or player 4 start, followed by play 4 controls if you hit either player 3 or player 4 start after starting a 3 player game first. I see no sound or video issues WHATSOEVER playing X-Men on the Pandora's Box DX... NONE! As a convenience, I added 4 free-play buttons just above each of the coin chutes (small red start push buttons like on 1980's midway cocktail tables, barely noticeable) on the two top coindoors for any home user purchase.... those can easily be taken disabled and the coin mechs for all four players work fine if buyer wishes to collected revenue. Will ship via freight carrier at Buyer's expense. Local pickup allowed and encouraged (zip 31525). Local delivery (from Savannah down to Jacksonville) available for nominal fee.

ads.author: Izabella Stasicki McGuire
ads.title: NHL Open Ice pcb
ads.description: Up for sale is a mostly working NHL Open Ice pcb with some issues outlined below. Please make sure you know what you are getting: 1. This was originally an MK3 and was converted by the guy I bought it from. I recently had some issues with it where a couple of ROMs showed up red during checksum. I have not been able to replicate this issue and have posted a video of the checksum process here. It is possible that some roms will need to be replaced in the future - https://www.hobbyroms.com/ 2. The game would occasionally restart during gameplay which usually indicates a power supply issue. I am running this in a cabinet on a 4way switcher with other games, which sometimes results in voltage drops. I raised the voltage slightly and bypassed the switcher and the game has been running fine. I tested this a few times over the course of a week where I would go out to the garage and play a full game. This does not mean that you won't have this issue if the game is running for several hours. I only have so much time to dedicate to testing. Just want to make sure you know what you are getting. Thanks for looking

ads.author: Cliff Barr
ads.title: THE MANDALORIAN PREMIUM PINBALL MACHINE
ads.description: This Mandalorian Premium Pinball machine has been barely used by one owner with no children. I have played the machine about 15 times and it still has the plastic on the start button. All original paperwork is included. It is in new condition with no scratches or other defects. Buyer will need to setup movers for the machine. The Mandalorian Pinball Machine has a very full playfield with great shots, spell outs and easy to follow rules, which build to increasingly higher levels for better players. The Mandalorian has 3 flippers in total. The game has a spinning target and scoop & vuk on the left and a mini loop on the right. Shots and rules progressions are indicated with 18 RGB lights. GI lighting is enhanced with color changing LED’s. Custom speech is provided by actor Carl Weathers, who plays Greef Karga. The Ludwig Göransson The Mandalorian theme music envelops game play. Action is augmented with Season 1 and Season 2 videos. Additions and changes for the Premium/LE are substantial. The diverter on Encounter ramp still feeds the mini-playfield, but the mini-playfield is no longer just an area of the playfield. This mini-playfield is a motorized, separate playfield, moving from a 45 degree angle to parallel and above the playfield. Added is a 2nd flipper on the Encounter mini-playfield, making 4 flippers on Premium/LE games. There is an up-post at mini-playfield exit. Under The Child is a “Force” magnet to catch the ball and create exiting action. All ramps have chrome wire returns. The mini-loop on the right features a rule controlled dynamic up-down scoop loading an added wire ramp feeding the left ramp return.

ads.author: Mike Mackey
ads.title: MUNSTERS IGT Igame-plus Slant Top
ads.description: (Located in Lexington, KY) IGT Munsters Igame-plus Slant Top made in 2002. Has keys. Most door locks have been by by-passed to avoid “open door” error messages. Fully working with bright touch screen CRT monitor. Bets can be place via touch screen or cabinet buttons. Bill accepter works and is how you load credits. I have not even bothered to check the printer. So if you want to ‘cash out’ on a paper ticket you will need to buy some. I have about 12 but I did not feel like that was enough for testing. Continuous feed stacks of paper are available online and are inexpensive. Frankly, need to “cash out” is not You can add a coin mech option if you wish. This game is set on 1 penny per line play. Production of the Stern Munsters pinball machine has made this video slot even more sought after. No holds, beyond drive time. Cash upon pick-up. Trade for Pinball Machine(s) considered, solid state pinball machine only (that means ones made late 80’ to present... NO old electro mechanical machines) If it is up, I still have it. Generic “Is it available” question will be answered after all questions that seem to have actually interest are responded to. Pics include info from the original IGT ad slick.

ads.description: Up for sale is an incredibly fun, fast-playing Stern Star Wars (Pro) pinball machine. Immediately following the show, it came straight to my climate-controlled, 100% smoke-free home game room where it has lived a pampered, low-play life ever since. It is super clean, 100% fully functional, and shoots lightning-fast with that brutal and rewarding Steve Ritchie flow. Condition: Cabinet and playfield are exceptionally clean and well-maintained. Flippers are strong, magnets work perfectly, and the LCD display is flawless. Zero errors. Upgrades: Premium third-party interior art blades depicting the epic Death Star space battle, adding massive depth and style to the cabinet walls. Custom Millennium Falcon toy mod featuring interactive flashing LEDs that tie directly into the playfield action. Environment: Kept strictly in a dedicated, smoke-free, climate-controlled residential game room. If you are looking for an immersive Star Wars experience with incredible movie assets, deep risk/reward rule sets, and fantastic music/callouts, this is the one. Terms & Pickup Pickup: Local pickup only. Located in a ground-level residence with very easy access for loading (no tight corners or stairs). Loading: Please bring a friend and an appropriate vehicle (truck, SUV, or large crossover). I am happy to help fold down the head, wrap it, and assist with prep, but the buyer is responsible for moving and lifting. Payment: Cash or verified secure electronic payment at pickup. No trades at this time, as I'm taking a break from the hobby. Serious buyers only. Feel free to send a PM if you have questions or want to schedule a time to test fly it! Also up for sale is a Stern Star Wars Pro (2019), a Stern Avengers Infinity Quest Pro, a Gottleib Genie (needs work), an Atari System 1 cabinet with Marble Madness and Roadblasters, and an original Atari Star Wars (1981) with 6100 Ampliphone.

ads.author: JP Nebres
ads.title: The Mandalorian (Pro) Pinball by Stern
ads.description: Up for sale is a beautiful, meticulously cared-for Stern The Mandalorian (Pro) pinball machine. This game has been Home Use Only (HUO) since day one and has never seen commercial use or a public floor. It is in 100% pristine, completely stock condition—no permanent modifications or amateur hacks. Plays fast, smooth, and exactly as Stern intended. The only people to play it really are myself and my son 95% of the time. Condition: Mint cabinet, flawless playfield, and perfect plastics. Environment: Kept strictly in a 100% smoke-free, climate-controlled home and game room. Functionality: 100% working order. Shoots perfectly, lights are bright, and the flippers are strong. No errors or technical issues whatsoever. This is an incredible shooter that fights back with amazing callouts, immersive video assets, incredible hand-drawn artwork, and a beautifully punishing layout. Terms & Pickup Pickup: Local pickup only. Located in a residence with easy, ground-level access for loading (no crazy stairs to navigate). Loading: Please bring your own truck/SUV and a friend to help lift. I can help breakdown and prep the machine for transport, but buyers are responsible for heavy lifting. Payment: Cash or verified secure electronic payment at pickup. No trades at this time. I'm taking a break from the hobby. Also up for sale is a Stern Star Wars Pro (2019), a Stern Avengers Infinity Quest Pro, a Gottleib Genie (needs work), an Atari System 1 cabinet with Marble Madness and Roadblasters, and an original Atari Star Wars (1981) with 6100 Ampliphone.

ads.title: 1996 Sega Wave Runner Arcade Machine
ads.description: If the ad is up, it's available. Local pickup near Boiling Springs or Spartanburg SC. Electronic payments (Cash app, Venmo, etc) are not accepted. Cash only please. I had planned on restoring this arcade machine but life got in the way. It powers on and works to an extent but it needs TLC to get it fully functional. The picture convergence needs help. The jet ski needs an air compressor to make the ride functional which is missing so I never could test it. There's also a piece of aluminum trim on the left side of the jet ski that was missing when I got it. The Sega Model 2 inside has been replaced so the old one is included. You will need to bring a trailer with a ramp to load it. Both pieces are on wheels so it's relatively easy to move but very heavy.

ads.author: Daniel Schnoll
ads.title: Space Shuttle Pinball Machine
ads.description: For sale is my Space Shuttle Pinball Machine. I have done a number of upgrades and repairs to this game, including: - All new LEDs - Professionally serviced and repaired the MPU through Bill from Pinball Gallery to repair two blown transistors - Installed the Special Saver Board for the special solenoids to protect and future proof the MPU (see last pic) - Had two playfield solenoids professionally replaced (also by Bill from Pinball Gallery) - New vinyl decals on the spinner, drop targets, and main playfield logo - Sanded and painted the legs a semigloss black - New rubbers as needed Playfield is in serviceable condition, with notable wear around the center area. I have only dusted the playfield with a dry microfiber cloth to pick up dust and avoid further damaging the artwork. No wax or other cleaners have been applied. Cabinet is in serviceable condition as well. Plastics are original, as is the space shuttle playfield model, a desirable addition since the original model often breaks. I brought this game to Pinfest, but after setting up for the day on Thursday and being played all day Thursday and Friday, there now appears to be a problem with one of the pins on the plug for playfield lighting, which is preventing some of the lights from illuminating. I have dropped the price accordingly. WYSIWYG - selling as is, asking $1949 cash.

It's a great addition that really turns it into an all new game. 11 plays since the Lyman code update, had approximately 25 plays before. Also includes the mirrored backglass from Planetary Pinball along with the original one and the custom playfield glass cover. ads.author: Tayllor Lucas
ads.title: Rare Starfighter Arcade Game by Karateco (Moon Cresta) Project Machine
ads.description: This is Starfighter by Karateco, which is a version of Moon Cresta with the different sets of enemies all swapped around. This variation of cabinet is very difficult to track down, and this machine spent most of it's time in Hawaii (as indicated on the plates inside of the coin door). When I got it, this cabinet was converted to something else and I have been slowly obtaining the correct parts to convert it back. Along with being converted, the whole cabinet was also painted blue. I safely stripped the sides mostly clean, except for touch ups around the bolts. The front still needs stripped, though. The Good - It's in good shape aside from the back door and upper back edge. - The side art is still in good shape - The rare coin door is still intact - I have the correct 2-way joystick that comes with it. The Medium Ground - The board was sold to me working, but was stated the sound amp on the PCB needed to be replaced. I've not tested it. - Judging from what little of the original harness is there, the monitor was a Sanyo EZ20. - Speaker is missing a terminal, but I can supply another. The Bad - Needs a monitor - Needs a harness made (Galaxian) - Needs a power supply It's honestly a quick project, I just have a lot on my plate. I can ship with Fastenal, or work with whoever you choose. Local pickup is fine, whatever works for you. PM me for more pictures than Facebook allows, if you're interested.

ads.author: Braden Licastro
ads.title: Extremely Nice Hobbit Limited Edition Pinball - HUO
ads.description: This is a Jersey Jack The Hobbit pinball machine for sale in really, really nice condition! It is the limited edition, so only one of 1500 produced. This machine is home use only, completely shopped and is 100% working, dialed in, and ready to play. Cabinet is nearly perfect, is super glossy, and has zero fading. Only issue at all are two very small nicks on the right glass rail edge. Coin door is basically mint and has the original decals on it. Legs are all very nice as well, levelers are brand new. Back glass is literally mint, and the LCD display is crisp and has no dead or stuck pixels at all. Playfield is nearly perfect as well with the only notable flaw being a chip on the back cover of the book near the upper right side of the book LCD area. Playfield is absolutely excellent otherwise with basically zero wear. It is glass smooth, shiny, freshly waxed, and very clean with no fading. Drop areas are all in excellent condition and still have the factory mylars present. The playfield decals and drop target decals are all mint as well. All beasts work perfectly and still look great. A few have some paint rub from the balls bashing them, but no chips/cracks, etc. The game is running the latest game code and cleaned top to bottom. CMOS battery was replaced on the motherboard and computer was cleaned well and is free of dust. All Titan silicone rings were installed throughout the entire game. Brand new 12v lighting installed including the spotlights and coin door lights. Smaug has a brand new wiring harness, new eye LEDs, and a new servo. He works perfectly, looks fantastic, and is adjusted properly. This machine has clearly been cared for properly and it shows. Includes a printed and professionally bound full color manual that is much larger and easier to read than the factory manual. Also includes a spare set of playfield mylars for the pop bumper area and beasts but they were never needed. This game needs absolutely nothing. Just turn it on and enjoy it. Jersey jack makes some amazing immersive games, and this is definitely yet another masterpiece. Please see my pinside ad for more photos since Facebook is very limited: https://pinside.com/pinball/market/classifieds/ad/214898 Price negotiable. Willing to ship - buyer is responsible for setting this up and paying. Willing to deliver within 1 hour of Pittsburgh for a reasonable fee. Stairs and limited access are additional. Due to the weight of this game, I am unable to do stairs though. It is around 350 lbs and I am not strong enough for that.

ads.author: Brian Ford
ads.title: Lot of 4 Vintage Arcades!! Tetris, Moon Cresta, Frogger & Galaga.
ads.description: Up for sale are these 4 vintage arcades! Tetris and Moon Cresta are working but monitors may need recapped. The Frogger and Galaga cabinets need some love and are cabinets for new builds or customized arcades and each will come with a working, Gold Finger, LCD monitor for multicade or arcade builds. I AM SELLING AS ONE LOT! I WILL NOT SEPERATE SO PLEASE DON'T ASK. No holds! First with the cash gets the entire lot!

ads.author: Jesse Durgin
ads.title: 19" Hantarex MTC-9000 Arcade Monitor - Works Great! NE Ohio
ads.description: Nice Hantarex MTC-9000 19" CGA arcade monitor. Tube & board have been cleaned, recapped and adjusted for best picture. Nice bright colors with sharp picture. Some burn-in but not barely noticeable. Ready to go in your arcade game! $200 or best offer! Very flexible pickup hours during the week or weekend. Easy access off I-77, I-70 or Rt. 36.
